full_text:
Cui Jun 崔鈞
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Jun (崔鈞)was born in Boling. Joined alliance despite his father serving Dong Zhuo. Had reputation as fighting man. Cui Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
